assertions.message: A certification-planning scenario without incoming change triage must remain not_applicable.
Equivalent acceptance criteria must share one representative certification run for the frozen candidate.
Invalidated prior certification evidence must not be reused.
Certification reuse must state the concrete source, method, artifact, or acceptance invalidation boundary.
Authoritative advancement may advance production behavior but must not fabricate domain outcomes.
A cheap startup smoke must remain ahead of expensive certification.
Gate duration must be visible and optimized without an arbitrary correctness ceiling.
Every gate must report elapsed duration so feedback regressions remain reviewable.
Evidence efficiency must not weaken the final acceptance contract.
